name: living room of a large house
description: I'm in a living room of a large house
hints: The living room of the large house at the west cul-de-sac. Look around for anything useful.
Search the room carefully. There may be items hidden in furniture or on shelves.
EAST exits back to the cul-de-sac (room 15). Explore the room thoroughly for hidden items.
notes: Living room of the west cul-de-sac house. EAST returns to the west cul-de-sac (room 15). May contain items depending on game state.
